name: Apothicare — Lisbon Apothecary
description: Old-world apothecary register meets modern clinical authority. Parchment-warm palette with deep botanical green anchor and brass accent — built for INFARMED-licensed Portuguese medical-cannabis practices that want to feel like a clinic, not a dispensary.
features: HeroFramed left-frame hero on botanical photography — distinctive opener vs the usual split layouts
TextMarquee credentials band (INFARMED · EU-GMP · Doctor Prescribed) breaks the page rhythm with a dark serif italic strip
TabsShowcase conditions matrix — chronic pain, sleep, anxiety, neurology — with per-tab evidence-based copy
Dark botanical About anchor with stat counters (1,400+ patients, 94% retention) for trust without bombast
Cormorant Garamond display + Inter body + Caveat script accent — apothecary type system
Dark-scoped Footer and Newsletter for clean light/dark rhythm; brass headers on botanical ground
WCAG 2.2 AA contrast pairs verified · prefers-reduced-motion honoured · focus-visible accent ring
author: BudStacks Platform
